subcodes.title: Words spoken at Windsor Hotel in Montreal, 1912-09-07
subcodes.first_line: As in the physical world there are four seasons, so in the realm of religion there is the season of heavenly and spiritual springtime.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چنانچه در عالم جسمانی فصول اربعه هست در عالم دیانت هم بهار الهی و ربیع روحانی است
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @spiritual springtime
